历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 4522 → 17511 → 5926 → 4019 → 4813. In 2022, due to adjustments in the exam format, there was an abnormal significant backward shift. Excluding that year, the rankings in the past three years fluctuated between 4019 and 5926. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 4813, a slight backward shift of about 794 compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province was 93 in 2021 → 99 in 2022 → 102 in 2023 → 106 in 2024 → 107 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 102, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a reduction of about 4.7%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 34th, and has been stable in the 33-34 range in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion incident raising campus safety concerns. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. There is no obvious signal of a significant drop in historical admission records for Chongqing University. Civil Engineering is A+, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Environmental Science and Engineering is A-, Electrical Engineering is A-, and Landscape Architecture is A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, with top majors like Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering highly matching the enrollment categories.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science maintain high social popularity (highly recommended), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, a 985 university in the southwest region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 4.7% (2025), which is moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4813, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 4.7% (which decreases the ranking number), and the 3.4% decrease in Shanxi physics category candidates (reducing competition), but the negative reputation may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (slightly intensifying competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4698, with a range of 4198-5198.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4198-5198, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4200), you can focus on top majors like the Excellence Plan and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (4600-4900), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Future Information and Mathematics and Physics Foundation. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>5000), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
